mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT user_code AS userCode, login_id AS loginId, user_name AS userName, email AS email, phone_number AS phoneNumber, TO_CHAR(signup_requested_at, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS requestedAt FROM users WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 'a1' ORDER BY user_code ASC ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 'a1'
